# Source Attribution

- Source repository: https://github.com/Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts
- Snapshot purpose: provide a vendored Claude-compatible prompt baseline for RustCode
- Imported for local use: 2026-04-11
- Adaptation notes: RustCode reads these prompts locally and composes them with AGENTS.md and `.rustcode/rustcode.md`. `/init` writes `.rustcode/rustcode.md`, not `CLAUDE.md`.
